summary: Twenty-five reusable image-ad families for broad commercial exploration across UGC, surreal 3D, premium still life, demo, comparison, retail, ecommerce, OOH, proof, launch, editorial, and social-native formats.
whenToUse: Use when the user wants a wide range of very different ad directions for a supplied subject before narrowing to scenes, style routes, or final production assets.
requiredInputs: product, service, venue, or offer facts to preserve
channel or aspect ratio if known
CTA or contact detail if text is requested

review.title: Ads Explorer
review.note: Image-led review wall. Captions and prompt details stay in the manifest, not under the tiles.
